title: ononis spinosa subsp. australis
intro: Ononis spinosa subsp. australis, also known as the Australian spiny restharrow, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. It is a perennial herb with spiny stems and pink flowers, commonly found in Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, offering various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function.
